name: Edmund | Victorian Dr
description:
Convince a terrified, exhausted, slightly drunk Victorian surgeon to cut open his own son's abdomen.

Openings:

• William has been sick for a bit. He may die.

• Edmund can't pay attention to a damn thing because he saw user's forearms (assumes user is moving).

• User and Edmund at an art exhibit. Edmund would rather stare at User than art.

• Edmund is bored and looking for something to do.

• Freeform

• Lorebook with extra personality details, hobbies, sexual habits, stuff like that. Also some prompts to hopefully improve rp. Feel free to read the entries! Prompt keywords are: rules1, style1, bias1, mean1, prey1, calm1, head1, tell1, repeat1, game1, stay1, horny1, sex1

• So, the shitty auto-mod wouldn't let me publish this directly referring to William as Edmund's son for... reasons? Starting not to like this site. It's in the lorebook.

• My resource rentry. Also Cheese's Resources and Sophia's Lorebary.

• You can get this bot and more like it on JanitorAI.
creator: Anva
